app.title: ECAD Forge
app.subtitle: Client-side schematic, PCB, 3D and BOM views for standalone native Altium documents.
app.dropTitle: Parse native Altium files entirely in the browser
app.dropCopy: The parser extracts printable native records from standalone documents, normalizes them, and feeds schematic, PCB, BOM, diagnostics, and 3D summary views.
status.ready: Drop a native SchDoc or PcbDoc file to begin.
status.loading: Parsing native Altium file in the browser...
